name: Turkish Sea Bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine garlic, olives, oregano, basil, and parsley in a small bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a large baking dish at 425 degrees F for 1 minute.
3. Spread the olive mixture evenly over the bottom of the baking dish.
4. Arrange sea bass, skin side up, on top of the olive mixture.
5. Pour vegetable stock or dry white wine around the fillets.
6. Bake, basting occasionally with juices, until done.
7. To serve, arrange fillets and olive mixture on heated serving plates.
